channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Seeks Engineers For Taiwan Terafab Targeting 2nm AI Chip Production
item.description: Job postings detail vertically integrated semiconductor facility spanning logic, memory, packaging, testing, and lithography

item.title: Tesla tells HW3 owner to ‘be patient’ after 7 years of waiting for FSD
item.description: The Dutch Tesla owner who launched a collective claim against Tesla over FSD on HW3 cars called Tesla to ask about the €6,400 he paid for “Full Self-Driving” in 2019. After 7 years of waiting, Tesla’s answer was to “just be patient.” It’s an almost comically tone-deaf response that perfectly enca...

item.title: Elon Musk has a solution for AI threat to jobs
item.description: The job market in a difficult stage. With the advent of artificial intelligence, fewer hands are needed to do the same amount of work. The World Economic Forum's Future of Jobs Report 2025 projects that 92 million roles will be displaced by 2030, while 41% of employers globally plan to reduce the...

item.title: Tesla just tipped its hand on a major Cybercab feature as production hits Plaid Mode
item.description: Tesla just tipped its hand on a major Cybercab feature as it is putting production into Plaid Mode, but a clear indication of what the company plans to do with the vehicle is now apparent. Tesla has delivered a clear signal that its Robotaxi ambitions are shifting into high gear, and it’s doing i...

item.title: Tesla: More Good News, And Markets Noticed
Tesla's Earnings: Why the Stock Is Poised for a Sharp Turnaround
item.description: Early data on Cybercab development along with tangible updates for Optimus could spark renewed enthusiasm.

item.title: Tesla Rallies 5% as Q1 Earnings Loom: A 33% Profit Surge Estimate Has Investors Watching Closely
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 5% in Friday morning trading, and the story behind the move is crystal-clear. Tesla is set to report its Q1 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 22, after market close, and Wall Street is positioning ahead of what could be a meaningful profit rebound. That anticipatio...

item.title: Tesla preps new Model Y trim for India, a once-elusive market
item.description: Tesla is preparing to bring its newest Model Y trim to India, a once-elusive market that was hesitant to allow any vehicles built outside the market into its automotive sector. Now, it is preparing to allow China-built Model Y vehicles to come into the country , in an effort to expand sales and o...

item.title: Tesla Earnings: What Robotaxi Updates Should Investors Expect?
item.description: Tesla plans to expand its robotaxi service to nine additional cities in the first half of this year. Next week's earnings call will provide a critical update on the automaker's progress.

item.title: Martin Shkreli Says Elizabeth Warren Shoots From The Hip And Is Wrong About Tesla, Disney And Palantir Paying Zero Taxes: 'You Don't Know Facts'
item.description: On Wednesday, former hedge fund manager known as the "Pharma Bro," Martin Shkreli, pushed back on Sen. Elizabeth Warren's (D-Mass.) accusations that several major U.S. corporations paid no federal income tax.

item.title: Tesla Hiring Signals Deeper Push Into Chips
item.description: Terafab roles hint at AI chip ambitions

item.title: Tesla, Microsoft May Have Entered Warren Buffett Territory — Growth Stocks Aren't Supposed To
item.description: Something unusual is happening in tech. Valuations have fallen so far in 2026 that traditional value investors — the bargain hunters who normally wouldn’t touch high-growth stocks — are starting to pay attention. That’s according to Canadian asset manager Middlefield Group, which noted in recent ...

item.title: Gear Up for Tesla (TSLA) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
item.description: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Tesla (TSLA), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

item.title: Big Ass Fans Parent Madison Air Is Just the Start. Why Mega-IPOs Are Taking Over.
item.description: With the S&P 500 and Nasdaq at record highs, the window is open for SpaceX as well as OpenAI and, Anthropic to make their public debuts.

item.title: Tesla Nears $400 Ahead of Q1 Earnings
item.description: Analysts remain divided between Tesla's EV pressure and its longer-term AI ambitions

item.title: Tesla stock poised to snap 8-week losing streak with earnings ahead
item.description: Tesla stock rose in early trade and is poised to finish the week higher and snap an eight-week losing streak. The rebound in the stock comes as earnings approach next Wednesday.

item.title: Tesla Stock Set to Snap 8-Week Losing Streak—Just in Time For Earnings
item.description: Tesla stock was advancing early Friday and is on course to snap an extended losing streak. Shares in the electric-vehicle maker were up 1.4% to $394.53 in premarket trading. Alongside broader equity markets, Tesla stock appears to have been lifted by news earlier in the week that the U.S.

item.title: Musk's Father Says Family Holds 23,400 Bitcoin As X Money Due To Go Live This Month
item.description: Errol Musk claimed in an interview that his sons Elon and Kimbal Musk hold a combined 23,400 Bitcoin, a stash worth roughly $1.7 billion at current prices around $74,000. The claim has not been independently verified. If accurate, it would...

item.title: How Tesla Stock Is Set to Snap Its Losing Streak
item.description: Tesla stock was advancing early Friday and is on course to snap an extended losing streak. Shares in the electric-vehicle maker were up 0.8% to $392.00 in premarket trading. Alongside broader equity markets, Tesla stock appears to have been lifted by news earlier in the week that the U.S.

item.title: Musk Moving at “Light Speed” to Sign Up Suppliers for $25B Terafab Chip Dream
item.description: Elon Musk is working at “light speed” to sign up chip suppliers to fulifill his $25B Terafab semiconductor dream. Speedy Price Estimates According to a report on Bloomberg, Musk’s team is reaching out to a number of chip industry suppliers such as Applied Materials (AMAT), Tokyo Electron (TOELY) ...

item.title: This Is the SpaceX Number No One Is Talking About -- and History Says It May Total $175 Billion
item.description: If history rhymes, prospective SpaceX IPO investors will be sorely disappointed.

item.title: Tesla in 3 Years: Boom, Bust, or Quietly Crushing It?
item.description: There's a range of outcomes for the stock over the next few years, but much of its future success rides on its robotaxi service.

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla Stock Before April 22? The Answer Might Surprise You.
item.description: Investors are about to receive an important progress update from Tesla CEO Elon Musk.

item.title: Tesla’s golden era is no longer a tagline
item.description: The golden age of autonomous ridesharing is arriving, and Tesla is making sure we can all picture a future that looks like the future. A recent teaser posted to X shows a Cybercab parked outside a home, and with a clear message that your everyday life may soon look like this when the driverless v...

item.title: SpaceX Dominating Tesla Cybertruck Sales
item.description: If Tesla Cybertruck sales didn’t look bad before, they sure do now. Apparently, SpaceX has been buying a huge chunk of them. There haven’t been many sales in recent months, but Musk’s companies have been buying them, especially SpaceX.

item.title: Tesla seeks Taiwan chip engineers for Terafab project
item.description: Tesla is seeking semiconductor engineers in Taiwan for its Terafab artificial intelligence chip complex, ‌according to job postings on its website. Taiwan is home to ‌the world’s largest contract chipmaker, TSMC, and has a highly specialised workforce with experience in ​leading-edge semiconducto...

item.title: Tesla Model Y vs BMW iX3 2026: Price, Range & Features Compared
item.description: Tesla Model Y vs BMW iX3 in Europe 2026: side-by-side comparison of price, range, charging speed, features and cost of ownership.

item.title: SpaceX Bought Nearly 20% Of Tesla Cybertrucks Sold In Q4
item.description: Tesla sold just over 7,000 Cybertrucks in Q4 last year. Elon Musk's companies bought about 20% of them, Bloomberg reported.

item.title: SpaceX Is Ready to Go Public. The Stock Market Is Its Rocket.
item.description: With the S&P 500 and Nasdaq at record highs, the window is open for SpaceX as well as OpenAI and, Anthropic to make their public debuts.

item.title: Can Tesla Stock Capitalize on the Market Rally Ahead of Earnings?
item.description: Wall Street is looking for earnings per share of 36 cents, according to FactSet A year ago, Tesla reported first-quarter earnings of 27 cents. EV deliveries and earnings, however, might not matter as much as what Musk and management say about AI-trained robo-taxis and robots. At the closing bel...

item.title: Tesla is facing up to $14.5 billion in lawsuits — and it’s only getting worse
item.description: Tesla is currently fighting on more than 20 active litigation fronts, ranging from Autopilot wrongful death suits to securities fraud and racial discrimination — with total potential financial exposure reaching as high as $14.5 billion. The company’s “hardcore litigation department” and its “corp...

item.title: Tesla, SpaceX Search For Suppliers For Elon Musk's Terafab Project: Report
item.description: Staff working on Elon Musk's Terafab project have been reaching out to suppliers of semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Tesla stock is up more than 11% this week.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Registrations Show Over 18% Bought By Musk Companies
item.description: Internal purchases supported Cybertruck demand, with 1,279 units acquired by SpaceX in Q4 amid weakening retail sales.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA): The Best EV Stock to Buy For Long Term Investment
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 12 Best EV Stocks to Buy For Long Term Investment. On April 13, 2026, UBS analyst Joseph Spak upgraded Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla’s last chance version of the flagship Model X is officially gone
item.description: Tesla enabled a last-chance version of its two flagship vehicles, the Model S and Model X, over the past few weeks. The Model X, the company’s original SUV, is officially gone. Tesla has officially closed the book on its most exclusive send-off for the Model X.

item.title: Musk's AI5 Chip Promises 5X More Power for Tesla By 2027
item.description: Musk announced Tesla's next-generation AI chip is close to completion, sending shares up nearly 8% while Waymo quietly dominates market share.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Demand Faces Reality Check
item.description: SpaceX absorbed nearly one in five Q4 registrations

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck Demand Gets Boost From Inside
item.description: Musk companies account for notable share of sales

item.title: How to Get a Piece of SpaceX Stock Ahead of the Crowd
item.description: The big SpaceX IPO could arrive as early as June, and it’s going to be a record-breaker in terms of size and excitement. Whether the price of admission implies a valuation north of $2 trillion (that’s on the high end) on the opening day or more, the big launch is going to draw some pretty ... How...

item.title: Tesla AI5 Chip Milestone Tests Robotic And Autonomy Ambitions
item.description: Tesla, NasdaqGS:TSLA, has completed the tape out for its new AI5 chip, marking the final design phase for its latest in house AI processor. The company has also outlined progress on its follow up AI6 chip and Dojo3 system, highlighting a faster cadence in custom AI hardware development. Managemen...

item.title: Tesla Optimus V3 hand and arm details revealed in new patents
item.description: Tesla is planning to soon reveal its latest and greatest version of the Optimus humanoid robot, and a series of new patents for the hands and arms, with the former being, admittedly, one of the most challenging parts of developing the project. Two new patents, which were coincidentally filed on t...

item.title: Analysts Are Divided Over Tesla Ahead of Q1 Earnings, but TSLA Stock Is a Buy Anyway
item.description: Tesla is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings next week. The stock looks like a buy on the physical AI story and stabilization in its EV business.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck sales bolstered by Musk’s other companies, data shows
item.description: Sales of Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA)’s Cybertruck have recently been supported in part by purchases from other businesses controlled by CEO Elon Musk, highlighting challenges the electric pickup faces in attracting broader consumer demand. Data from S&P Global Mobility cited by Bloomberg News...

item.title: Tesla makes Signature Edition buyers sign no-resale agreement with $50,000 penalty
item.description: Tesla is requiring buyers of its limited Signature Edition Model S and Model X to sign a “No Resale Agreement” that threatens $50,000 in liquidated damages, or the full resale value, whichever is greater, if they flip the vehicle within the first year. An invited buyer shared the agreement with E...

item.title: 2026 Strategic Profiling of North America' Leading Automotive OEMs' Connected Services: Rivian, Ford, Stellantis, Ram, Chrysler, Jeep, Dodge, Lincoln, GM, Tesla
item.description: Significant growth opportunities exist in connected services, particularly in infotainment, safety, and EV-specific offerings. North American automakers are capitalizing on software-defined platforms and strategic EV expansions, enhancing digital experiences, and regionalizing services to stay co...

item.title: Lam Research Drawn Into Musk’s Terafab AI Chip Ambitions
item.description: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) has been identified as a supplier engaged by Elon Musk’s Terafab initiative, a new AI chip complex involving Tesla, SpaceX, Intel, and xAI. Terafab is seeking pricing and delivery timelines from leading semiconductor equipment makers, including Lam Research, for advan...

item.title: Next Generation Electric Vehicles OEM Strategy Analysis Report 2026 Featuring VW, BMW, Ford, GM, Hyundai, Stellantis, Nio, Toyota, VinFast, BYD, Mercedes-Benz, Tesla
item.description: The EV market offers opportunities in mass-market EV development, adoption of alternative battery chemistries and 800V architecture, and universal platforms to accelerate adoption. OEMs are revisiting electrification targets, focusing on circularity and sustainability amidst supply chain challeng...

item.title: BYD’s new Sealion 05 EV is a smart electric SUV that’s cheaper than it looks
item.description: It’s slightly smaller than the Tesla Model Y but costs less than half as much. BYD unveiled the new Sealion 05 EV and PHEV days ahead of their official debut. The entry-level electric SUV is equipped with BYD’s “God’s Eye” smart driving system and starts at just around $16,000.

item.title: Musk Pushes Terafab Suppliers to Move at 'Light Speed'
item.description: Elon Musk's staff working on his envisioned Terafab joint venture between Tesla Inc. and SpaceX have reached out to chip industry suppliers seeking price quotes and delivery times for chipmaking gear. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Preview: Why The Dream Is Breaking Down
